items.name: Operations Director
items.quote: They asked better questions about our business than most people who work in it. The system fits us — we didn't have to fit the system.

items.name: Managing Partner
items.quote: Delivered on the date they named at the start. In this industry that alone would be remarkable. It also just works.

items.name: General Manager
items.quote: We used to find out what happened in the field a month later. Now I open the dashboard and it's already there. That changed how we run the company.

items.name: Founder
items.quote: The old store lost people at checkout and we never knew why. They rebuilt it, showed us the numbers, and the numbers went up. Plain as that.

items.name: Estates Manager
items.quote: Ninety rooms, one calendar, zero double bookings since launch. The monthly reports used to take me two days — now they run themselves.
